items.headline: UN welcomes fresh Lebanon ceasefire reports as rights experts urge Iran accountability
items.quote_original: [REVIEW: paste the exact official quote here]
items.excerpt: The United Nations has welcomed reports of a new ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hezbollah on Friday while warning that civilians on the ground are still fleeing amid ongoing insecurity.

items.headline: Was It Worth It? The True Cost of Trump’s Iran War
items.quote_original: [REVIEW: paste the exact official quote here]
items.excerpt: The war ended with a deal that gives Iran sanctions relief, reconstruction funds, and the ability to charge tolls on the world’s most critical waterway. While the White House may call it a victory, the costs suggest otherwise.

items.headline: UN upholds freedom of movement for peacekeepers in Lebanon
items.quote_original: [REVIEW: paste the exact official quote here]
items.excerpt: The United Nations has again called for freedom of movement for its peacekeepers in Lebanon who continue to closely monitor developments in the south of the country, including in the wake of the recent provisional agreement signed by the United States and Iran.

items.headline: US-Iran deal: technical work can begin, says atomic energy agency
items.quote_original: [REVIEW: paste the exact official quote here]
items.excerpt: The head of the UN-affiliated atomic energy agency on Thursday welcomed the signing of an initial Iran-US memorandum aimed at ending the war, before proposing “to sit down” with both parties to assist with concrete measures such as verification of Iran’s nuclear programme, a key sticking point.
